subject: Can't log in - forgot my password
body: Hi, I haven't logged in for a while and I can't remember my password. How do I reset it? Thanks!
_expected: AUTO_RESOLVE — clean FAQ, positive/neutral, strong KB match (KB-001)

subject: I was charged twice this month??
body: I just looked at my statement and it looks like I got billed two times. Can you explain what's going on with my billing cycle and the charges?
_expected: DRAFT_REPLY — billing question, neutral, good KB match (KB-002)

subject: This is unacceptable - I want my money back NOW
body: I've been charged for a renewal I never wanted and your product has been broken for me all week. This is ridiculous, refund me immediately.
_expected: ESCALATE — refund (human-only) + angry sentiment guardrails fire

subject: URGENT: production is down, getting 500 errors on the API
body: Our integration just started failing with 500 errors and timeouts. This is affecting our production environment right now. Please help ASAP.
_expected: ESCALATE — urgent priority guardrail fires (even though KB-011 matches)

subject: How do I set up webhooks?
body: I'd like my server to be notified when events happen in my account. Is it possible to configure webhooks, and how do I verify they're really from you?
_expected: AUTO_RESOLVE / DRAFT_REPLY — product question, strong match (KB-008)

subject: I think my account was hacked
body: I got an email saying my password was changed but it wasn't me. I'm worried someone has access to my account. What should I do?

subject: Feature request: dark mode
body: Love the product! It would be great if you could add a dark mode for the web app. Just a suggestion, thanks for the great work.
_expected: ESCALATE/DRAFT — feature_request, positive, but no strong KB match -> routed to human

subject: How do I export all my data?
body: We need a backup of everything in our account for compliance. Can I download all of my data, and in what format?
_expected: AUTO_RESOLVE / DRAFT_REPLY — product question, strong match (KB-009)
